content.json:
# Windows Firewall — Deny Traffic Overview
**MITRE ATT&CK:** T1562.004 Impair Defenses: Disable or Modify System Firewall
**Theme:** Windows Firewall deny parsing · **Data source:** `WindowsFirewall` (AMA Windows Firewall DCR, `Action` in Drop/Block) with `SecurityEvent` fallback (EventID 5152/5157).

Top-level view of dropped/blocked traffic: by host, over time, by destination port, and direction.

> The `WindowsFirewall` table requires the Windows Firewall DCR. If you only have `SecurityEvent`, use workbooks 30-31.

content.query: WindowsFirewall | where Action in ('Drop', 'Block') | summarize Denies=count() by Computer | top 50 by Denies desc | render barchart
content.title: Denies by host

content.query: WindowsFirewall | where Action in ('Drop', 'Block') | summarize Denies=count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), Direction | render timechart
content.title: Deny volume over time by direction

content.query: WindowsFirewall | where Action in ('Drop', 'Block') | summarize Denies=count() by DestPort, Protocol | top 50 by Denies desc
content.title: Top blocked destination ports

content.query: WindowsFirewall | where Action in ('Drop', 'Block') | summarize Denies=count() by Direction | render piechart
content.title: Inbound vs outbound denies
